description_long: This rifle features a boxy, angular design with a prominent rectangular stock and a straight, cylindrical barrel extending from the front. The body is predominantly dark, likely constructed from metal or polymer, with a matte or semi-gloss finish. The trigger guard is large and angular, and the grip is integrated into the lower receiver, providing a sturdy hold. There are two raised sights along the top rail, suggesting basic iron sight functionality. The magazine is not externally visible, indicating it may be internal or not modeled. The overall form is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on function.
description: A dark, angular rifle with a rectangular stock, straight barrel, and integrated iron sights. The design is utilitarian and minimalistic, with a matte or semi-gloss finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel end and the symmetrical, boxy body with the top rail and sights visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular stock, straight barrel, large trigger guard, and integrated grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the alignment of the top rail and sights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the same angular features and overall silhouette.
